title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Usopp, Tama as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Give me a new name, Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am ZEUS, Nami's right hand man!! Brace yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No it's not! It's my job...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is just like what happened to page one-sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now two of the flying six have been defeated!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It can't be! This is unheard of!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are they backing us into a corner?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BAO HUANG-SAMA, EVERYBODY CAN HEAR YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh no! I didn't mean to broadcast that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But she seems to be a transmitter! Give your orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat and open's brat are already dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're going to play, you should learn to protect your pieces!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A shot-nosed kid like you throwing off your chains...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You think you can just leave?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right!! I'm going to sail the seas with Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...After I drive you out of Wano, Kaido!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 45 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
